compiled_state.title: Create Figma API fixture JSON files for integration test suite
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Create the fixture directory and two JSON fixture files used by the Figma pull-back integration test suite.

## Files to Create
- tests/integration/fixtures/figma/figma-file-response.json — representative Figma REST API v1 GET /v1/files/:key response payload. Must include: a document node with at least one FRAME child containing TEXT, RECTANGLE, COMPONENT, and INSTANCE sub-nodes. Each node must have: id, name, type, absoluteBoundingBox (x, y, width, height), fills, strokes, characters (for TEXT). COMPONENT nodes must have a componentId field.
- tests/integration/fixtures/figma/figma-401-response.json — Figma API unauthorized response: {"status": 403, "err": "Forbidden"}

## testing_mode: GREEN
No conditional logic. Purely structural data files. Unit test exemption applies:
1. No conditional logic in the output
2. Any test would be a change-detector asserting file existence/content
3. Infrastructure-boundary-only — fixture data for other tests

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/integration/fixtures/figma/ directory exists
  Verify: test -d tests/integration/fixtures/figma
- [ ] figma-file-response.json is valid JSON with required fields (document.children[0].type=FRAME, nested nodes of types TEXT/RECTANGLE/COMPONENT/INSTANCE)
  Verify: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('tests/integration/fixtures/figma/figma-file-response.json')); assert d['document']['children'][0]['type']=='FRAME'"
- [ ] figma-401-response.json is valid JSON with status and err fields
  Verify: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('tests/integration/fixtures/figma/figma-401-response.json')); assert 'status' in d and 'err' in d"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0 (no regressions introduced)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: AC amendment: Fixture must include all required node types for mapping tests. figma-file-response.json must contain at minimum: one FRAME node (with children), one TEXT node (with characters field), one RECTANGLE node (with fills and strokes), one COMPONENT node (with componentId), and one INSTANCE node. Each node must have: id, name, type, absoluteBoundingBox (x, y, width, height), fills, strokes.
comments.author: Test

comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — AC1 pass (dir exists), AC2 pass (FRAME at children[0] with TEXT/RECTANGLE/COMPONENT/INSTANCE sub-nodes), AC3 pass (status+err fields in 401 fixture), AC4 pre-existing CI failures unrelated to this task
